---
title: "How Caffeine Affects the Nervous System"
author: "Your Name"
format: revealjs
---

## Introduction

- Caffeine is a stimulant that affects the nervous system  
- It works at the level of neurotransmitters in the brain  

---

## Content

### Normal Function
- Adenosine builds up → causes sleepiness  

### Mechanism of Caffeine
- Blocks adenosine receptors  
- Prevents drowsiness signaling  

### Effects on Nervous System
- Increases neural activity  
- Increases dopamine and norepinephrine  
- Leads to alertness, focus, and improved mood  

### Key Point
- Caffeine does not create energy — it blocks fatigue  

---

## Conclusion

- Caffeine alters nervous system activity at the receptor level  
- It increases alertness by blocking adenosine  
- It has both benefits and side effects
